# Copilot Context (Repository Navigation)

This repository is a **Copilot-first governance kit** (modules + compositions) plus execution playbooks (skills) and personas (agents). It is not a production application.

## Where the truth is defined
- Effective governance (authoritative ruleset):
  - `.copilot/compositions/spring-angular-layered-rest/EFFECTIVE.md`
- Reusable governance modules:
  - `.copilot/modules/`

## How work is executed
- Skills (task playbooks/checklists):
  - `.github/skills/`
- Agents (role-based guidance/review):
  - `.github/agents/`

## Notes
- Avoid hard-coding architecture decisions here; compositions define those choices.
